Million Hearts® CVD Risk Reduction Model Medicare Data Files Codebook │ May 2025 │ V 1.1 35 

PATIENT_RACE 

LABEL: Patient's Race 

DESCRIPTION: Patient's race. 

SHORT NAME: PATIENT_RACE 

LONG NAME: PATIENT_RACE 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 6 

FILE(S): Demographic 
Alignment (final and EVAA cycle files) 

SOURCE: Million Hearts Data Registry 

VALUES: 1002-5 = American Indian or Alaska Native 
2028-9 = Asian 
2054-5 = Black or African
